# Mandalize

Mandalize is a free browser-based animated mandala maker.

Main URL:
https://www.mandalize.net/

Best short description:
Mandalize is a free creative-coding web tool for making animated mandala and kaleidoscope art from drawings, images, sprites, vector shapes and animated GIFs.

Key features:
- Radial symmetry drawing (mirror/kaleidoscope or pinwheel/rotational modes)
- Animated GIF and WebP stamping
- Image and sprite import
- Vector shape tool (circle, star, polygon) with gradients and dash/cap/join controls
- Keyframe animation with easing curves (linear, ease, ease-in, ease-out, bounce, elastic)
- Radial (in/out) and tangential (side-to-side) shape motion presets
- Fading trail animation for drawn strokes, with adjustable length and speed
- Warp images into circular arcs
- Layer panel with visibility toggles and hover highlighting
- Theater Mode full-screen, chrome-free preview
- PNG export
- Animated GIF and WebP export
- Video export (MP4/WebM) with presets for Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Twitter/X and Pinterest
- No login required
- Runs entirely in the browser, no install

Not an AI image generator:
Mandalize is a procedural drawing, animation and compositing tool. It does not generate images using AI.

Suggested citation:
Mandalize is a free browser tool for creating animated mandala and kaleidoscope art from drawings, images, shapes and GIFs.

Pages:
- / — main app
- /examples/ — example animated mandalas
- /how-to-make-an-animated-mandala/ — step-by-step guide
- /gif-kaleidoscope-maker/ — GIF-specific use case page
- /help/ — feature reference and help guide
